text:
This variable is the monthly indicator of the beneficiary’s Medicare-Medicaid eligibility type code. CCW 
creates this variable using a hierarchy that gives priority to full benefit dual status over other types of 
enrollment. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: MBSF/T-MSIS DE file (derived) (derived) 

VALUES: 1 = Medicaid only— Aged/Blind/or Disabled (A/B/D) (non-dual) 
2 = Medicare only (non-dual) 
3 = Partial Dual) 
4 = Full Dual 
0 = Not MMLEADS population for the month 
Null/missing = not
